scripts.version:patch: cd apps/web && npm version patch --no-git-tag-version && cd ../api && npm version patch --no-git-tag-version
scripts.version:minor: cd apps/web && npm version minor --no-git-tag-version && cd ../api && npm version minor --no-git-tag-version
scripts.version:major: cd apps/web && npm version major --no-git-tag-version && cd ../api && npm version major --no-git-tag-version
